metadata.title:
APRON AT POWER HOUSE DAM
HAS RAISED WATER so THAT
WORK IS SERIOUSLY RETARD.
ED ON WASHINGTON STREET
PIERS.

pages.raw_text:
Bridge building has been again
retarded, this time by the Washing
ton Water Power Co., which has
raised the water feet by building
the apron" at the falls to supply
the power house. By doing this the
water has been backed up in the
raGyth channel OF the river until it
is fully feet higher at the Wash
ington st. bridge than II the apron
were not put on.


In consequence workmen are find
ing 1t difficult to set the piers and
the work, which started last week
with every prospect of rapid prog
ress, may be held up until the city
officials go on their knees and ask
the company II 1t won't please al
low work to continue. Even the
company will probably refuse.


The w. w. p. has been the only
obstacle In new bridge operations,
II knocked down the center span
on Howard st. and dillydallied
around long time before TEN.
porary structure was built and the
company was ordered to pay half of
the expense-whlch 1t has never
done.


Next the other Howard st. work
was suggested and the company
butted into this and wanted differ.
ent plans and engineers from those
thought competent by city officials.
Then the Walace-Coates CO., Chi
cago bridge experts, prepared plans
